subject: grammar
title: Verb Patterns: Meaning Change
instruction: Choose the correct form of the verbs.

questions.text: Mario remembered ___ his assignment to his tutor because he had spoken to her about its length, but she insisted that she had never received it.
If you can't find the information at the library, try ___ on the Internet.
She studied medicine at university and went on ___ a surgeon.
Look at Mum's car! It definitely needs ___!
I'll never forget ___ off that swing when I was a child.
I was really nervous about the interview, and although I tried ___ , I was awake most of the night.
The new government needs ___ notice of the opinions of the people.
It seems that the new system of sending out reminders has worked, because this year 90% of members remembered ___ their membership in time.
Economists predict that house prices will go on ___ for at least another year.
We weren't able to see the concert because Tamsin forgot ___ the tickets.
